name: Donald Trump
summary: Day 69 Thursday. **TRUMP-IRAN 14-POINT MOU NOW DRAFTED — 48-HOUR IRAN RESPONSE WINDOW (~MAY 8 EVENING); 'BOMBING STARTS AT SIGNIFICANTLY HIGHER LEVEL AND INTENSITY' IF NO DEAL.** Day 2 of pause framework hardened into substantive memorandum text: Witkoff and Kushner negotiating directly with Iran AND through Pakistani mediators. Provisions explicit: end-of-war declaration, 12-15 yr Iran enrichment moratorium (compromise from 20yr-US/5yr-Iran demand), Iran ships out HEU stockpile, US lifts sanctions and frozen assets, BOTH sides lift Hormuz blockades, 30-day post-signing detail window. Trump posted Truth Social May 6 morning: conflict 'could soon come to an end if Iran agrees,' but warned 'U.S. forces would resume bombing at a significantly higher level and intensity' if not. Classic deal-or-coercion framing — rhetorical leverage paired with real diplomatic offer (RHETORIC/THREAT, not new escalation). Markets adjudicated the upside (Brent -7% on May 6 to $103, S&P record +1.5%, VIX 17.39, KOSPI 7,485 record) but downside NOT priced — if Iran rejects, expect Brent +$8-15 within 24h, defense rotation re-engagement, gold continued bid (genuine war-risk this time). Vali Nasr (Bloomberg/DAWN) explicitly challenged Trump's framing as overclaiming: 'claimed Iran had agreed to giving up its nuclear program without actually those agreements having been made.' Sadjadpour: 48hr window 'structurally inadequate' given Mojtaba 60-day absence and Pezeshkian-IRGC factional split — expect Iran to request extension or counter-proposal that drags timeline past May 14. The 'fourth high-profile reversal within 30 days' trigger remains active (May 5 pause = 5th of cycle); 'Trump pause holds 7+ days without further kinetic exchange' watching trigger now Day 2/7 (test by May 12).

recent_signals.verification: MOU drafting = REPORTED (Axios scoop multi-corroborated, final text not published); Trump bombing warning = CONFIRMED (Truth Social primary, CBS/NBC corroborated); RHETORIC/THREAT (no operational deployment to support); Nasr critique = CONFIRMED (Bloomberg primary, DAWN MENA primary)

historical_summaries.summary: 7 signals. Issued 48-hour ultimatum demanding Iran reopen Hormuz or face strikes on power grid | Posted on Truth Social claiming 'productive conversations' with Iran and announced 5-day strike pause | Claimed 15 points of agreement with Iran including 'never have a nuclear weapon,' with April 9 target date

36 signals. EXIT TIMELINE EMERGING: (1) Trump stated US could end Iran war in '2-3 weeks' — first public exit timeline (RHETORIC, but markets priced it: | First primetime address to nation on the war (April 1 evening) | 28% Republican disapproval per CNN poll
